purpose: Investing signal for quarterly rebalance decisions across crypto, stocks, macro, and space-adjacent themes.
AI-age relevance for a solo freelancer/operator: tools to try, skills to build, business ideas to test, and work that remains valuable as models improve.
selectionPrinciples: Prefer primary operators, builders, analysts, and domain experts over pure aggregation.
Prefer cadence plus depth: recurring output that can compound into a living signal library.
Separate core sources from scout sources so the ingest stays useful instead of noisy.

topics.label: AI Tools
topics.description: Models, agents, coding tools, workflows, and applied automation.

topics.label: Operator Edge
topics.description: Freelance relevance, business ideas, product strategy, and agent-native work.

topics.label: Macro
topics.description: Liquidity, rates, fiscal policy, cycles, and allocation context.

topics.label: Crypto
topics.description: Bitcoin, Ethereum, DeFi, tokens, protocols, and onchain adoption.

topics.label: Investing
topics.description: Portfolio implications, public equities, risk, and quarterly rebalance cues.

topics.label: Space
topics.description: Launch systems, space economy, satellite infrastructure, and frontier hardware.

channels.name: IndyDevDan
channels.whyWatch: Hands-on AI coding and agent workflow signal from a builder perspective.
channels.lens: What should a freelancer adopt or build this month?

channels.name: AI News & Strategy Daily | Nate B Jones
channels.whyWatch: Useful for AI strategy, agent-native operating patterns, and fast-moving tool shifts.
channels.lens: What changes the frontier of solo/company work?

channels.name: AI Explained
channels.whyWatch: Dense model-release interpretation and benchmark context without much tool-review noise.
channels.lens: Which model capability changes are real enough to matter?

channels.name: Burke Holland
channels.whyWatch: Developer tooling and applied Microsoft/GitHub ecosystem signal.
channels.lens: Which dev workflows are becoming default?

channels.name: Fireship
channels.whyWatch: Fast, high-signal software trend radar with excellent compression.
channels.lens: What dev shifts are entering mainstream awareness?

channels.name: Limitless Podcast
channels.whyWatch: Longer-form AI engineering and career relevance. Added explicitly.
channels.lens: What should a serious AI engineer understand beneath the surface?

channels.name: Benjamin Cowen
channels.whyWatch: Data-driven crypto cycle and risk framing; useful counterweight to hype.
channels.lens: Are risk-on assets entering accumulation, distribution, or wait mode?

channels.name: Real Vision
channels.whyWatch: Macro, liquidity, and crypto-market regime conversations.
channels.lens: What top-down regime should govern quarterly allocation?

channels.name: Lyn Alden Media
channels.whyWatch: High-quality structural macro, fiscal dominance, money, and energy context.
channels.lens: Which long-duration theses deserve patience?

channels.name: Patrick Boyle
channels.whyWatch: Skeptical finance, market structure, and macro context with less crypto-native bias.
channels.lens: What narrative is wrong, crowded, or underpriced?

channels.name: Coin Bureau
channels.whyWatch: Broad crypto market and token coverage; useful for watchlist expansion.
channels.lens: Which crypto narratives are entering retail distribution?

channels.name: The DeFi Report
channels.whyWatch: Small-channel DeFi and Bitcoin macro signal; worth trialing because it may be less consensus.
channels.lens: What is the non-mainstream crypto alpha case?

channels.name: Bankless
channels.whyWatch: Crypto-native market structure, Ethereum, regulation, and founder/operator context.
channels.lens: What matters to onchain builders and capital allocators now?

channels.name: Forward Guidance
channels.whyWatch: Macro plumbing, rates, credit, and liquidity conversations.
channels.lens: What are the market mechanics behind the narrative?

channels.name: Marcus House
channels.whyWatch: Weekly space industry compression, especially SpaceX and launch infrastructure.
channels.lens: Which space infrastructure themes are becoming investable?

channels.name: Everyday Astronaut
channels.whyWatch: Deep technical context on launch systems; lower cadence, high depth.
channels.lens: Which engineering bottlenecks shape the space economy?

channels.name: The Defiant
channels.whyWatch: Good DeFi news source, but keep scout until noise level is proven.
channels.lens: Which DeFi primitives are actually being used?

channels.name: Greg Isenberg
channels.whyWatch: Useful business idea and AI-native company signal; scout because volume is high.
channels.lens: What business models can a solo operator test?

channels.name: Theo - t3.gg
channels.whyWatch: Developer ecosystem signal; scout to avoid duplicate coding-news coverage.
channels.lens: Which developer stack choices are becoming durable?

channels.name: Andrej Karpathy
channels.whyWatch: Foundational AI education; low cadence but high value when active.
channels.lens: Which fundamentals are worth internalizing?

channels.name: NASASpaceflight
channels.whyWatch: Excellent raw space coverage, but too much launch/live noise for core signal.
channels.lens: What space events deserve follow-up from higher-compression sources?
